items.title: Chrome vs. Edge vs. Firefox: I tested each browser's AI, but I'm only sticking with one
items.summary: Looking to use AI while you browse the web? Here's how the AI tools in Chrome, Edge, and Firefox compare.
items.titleZh: Chrome vs.Edge vs.Firefox：我测试了每个浏览器的AI，但我只坚持一个
items.summaryZh: 想在浏览网页时使用人工智能吗？以下是Chrome、Edge和Firefox中的AI工具的比较。

items.title: Agent confidence on the technical frontier
items.summary: Enterprise investment in AI is booming. Gartner is calling 2026 an “inflection year” for organizations to align their AI projects with strategic business objectives. As the pressure to prove ROI mounts, executives and technology leaders are looking to agentic…
items.titleZh: 代理商对技术前沿的信心
items.summaryZh: 企业对人工智能的投资正在蓬勃发展。Gartner称2026年是组织将其人工智能项目与战略业务目标相结合的“拐点年”。随着证明投资回报率的压力越来越大，高管和技术领导者正在寻求代理…

items.title: Robot hand company settles Tesla trade secret suit and announces $11M raise
items.summary: The startup, Proception, is taking a unique approach to collecting training data to tackle one of the hardest problems in robotics: hands.
items.titleZh: 机器人手公司解决了特斯拉的商业秘密诉讼，并宣布筹集1100万美元
items.summaryZh: 初创公司Proception正在采取一种独特的方法来收集训练数据，以解决机器人技术中最困难的问题之一：手。

items.title: ‘Podcasts are the NBA’: Scott Galloway on Kara Swisher’s big success — ‘there’s a small amount of people making a lot of money’
items.summary: Five staff, $20 million in revenue and every Democratic presidential hopeful in her inbox. Not bad for a tech and business podcast.
items.titleZh: “播客就是NBA”：斯科特·加洛韦谈卡拉·斯威舍的巨大成功——“有一小部分人赚了很多钱”
items.summaryZh: 她的收件箱里有五名员工，2000万美元的收入和每一位民主党总统候选人。对于科技和商业播客来说，这还不错。

items.title: Comcast is cutting NBCUniversal loose. Netflix, Apple, and Amazon might want to look.
items.summary: Comcast spent 25 years arguing that media and broadband belonged together. Now it's breaking them apart.
items.titleZh: 康卡斯特正在放松NBCUniversal。Netflix、苹果和亚马逊可能想看看。
items.summaryZh: 康卡斯特花了25年的时间认为媒体和宽带应该放在一起。现在它正在把他们分开。

items.title: Rocket Lab is buying Iridium’s satellite network for $8 billion to take on SpaceX
items.summary: Rocket Lab, the space company best known for its small satellite launcher Electron, has announced plans to acquire Iridium Communications for $8 billion. The deal will combine Rocket Lab's launch services and spacecraft manufacturing with Iridium's satellite-…
items.titleZh: 火箭实验室以80亿美元收购铱星公司的卫星网络，以对抗太空探索技术公司
items.summaryZh: 以小型卫星发射器Electron而闻名的太空公司Rocket Lab宣布计划以80亿美元收购铱星通信公司。该协议将火箭实验室的发射服务和航天器制造与铱星公司的卫星制造相结合…

items.title: Tesla starts FSD v14 ‘Lite’ rollout to HW3 cars
items.summary:
Tesla has started rolling out FSD v14 “Lite” to its Hardware 3 (HW3) cars, the company’s AI chief Ashok Elluswamy confirmed today. The build, firmware version 2026.20.5.1, is going out first to early-access drivers.
It’s the first major Full Self-Driving upda…
items.titleZh: 特斯拉开始在HW3汽车上推出FSD v14“Lite”
items.summaryZh: 特斯拉的人工智能主管Ashok Elluswamy今天证实，特斯拉已经开始在其硬件3（HW3）汽车上推出FSD v14“Lite”。该版本的固件版本为2026.20.5.1，将首先推出早期访问驱动程序。

items.title: Legendary market bears Jeremy Grantham and Michael Burry clash with critics over their track records
items.summary: A TV host told Jeremy Grantham he's done a "grave disservice" to investors, while Michael Burry dealt with doubts about his "Big Short" trade.
items.titleZh: 传奇市场看跌者Jeremy Grantham和Michael Burry因业绩记录与评论家发生冲突
items.summaryZh: 一位电视主持人告诉Jeremy Grantham，他对投资者造成了“严重伤害”，而Michael Burry则对他的“大空头”交易表示怀疑。

items.title: RELX lines up another £100M buyback as its 2026 repurchases roll on
items.summary: RELX does not make headlines the way a chip foundry or an AI lab does, which is rather the point of the business. It sells data, analytics, and the dull certainty of recurring revenue, and it returns the proceeds to shareholders on a metronome. The latest bea…
items.titleZh: 随着2026年回购的继续，RELX将再次回购1亿英镑
items.summaryZh: RELX不会像芯片代工厂或人工智能实验室那样成为头条新闻，这才是业务的重点。它出售数据、分析和经常性收入的枯燥确定性，并通过节拍器将收益返还给股东。最新的bea…

items.title: Rocket Lab buys Iridium for $8bn in a bet to become a smaller Starlink
items.summary: For most of its life Rocket Lab has sold the picks and shovels of the space economy: small rockets, satellite buses, components for other people’s missions. It has now decided that selling the tools is not as valuable as owning the mine. The company agreed to…
items.titleZh: Rocket Lab以80亿美元收购Iridium，押注成为规模较小的Starlink
items.summaryZh: 在其生命的大部分时间里，火箭实验室一直在销售太空经济的镐和铲子：小型火箭、卫星巴士、其他人任务的组件。现在，它已经决定，出售这些工具不如拥有矿山更有价值。公司同意…

items.title: Tesla batteries stolen from Giga Nevada 11+ times since December
items.summary:
Trailers loaded with millions of dollars of Tesla car and home batteries have been stolen straight from loading docks at the company’s Nevada operations at least 11 times since December, according to sheriff’s records.
Nine of the suspected cargo thefts happe…
items.titleZh: 自去年12月以来，特斯拉电池在Giga Nevada被盗11次以上
items.summaryZh: 根据警长的记录，自去年12月以来，装载着价值数百万美元的特斯拉汽车和家用电池的拖车至少11次直接从该公司内华达州业务的装卸码头被盗。

items.title: AI spending boom accelerates as Big Tech pours trillions into infrastructure
items.summary: JPMorgan raised its AI capital spending forecast through 2030 as companies continue to expand AI infrastructure.
items.titleZh: 随着大型科技公司向基础设施投入数万亿美元，人工智能支出热潮加速
items.summaryZh: 摩根大通上调了到2030年的人工智能资本支出预测，因为公司继续扩大人工智能基础设施。
